zh.Ingham, Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, Un: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可英厄姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Oliver Ingham於大約1287年出生在英國時，他的父親John de Ingham38歲，母親Margery De Ingham22歲。他和Elizabeth Zouche至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1344年1月29日在英國諾福爾可英厄姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

zh-hans.Ingham, Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, Un: 英国英格兰諾福爾可英厄姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Oliver Ingham于大约1287年出生在英国时，他的父亲John de Ingham38岁，母亲Margery De Ingham22岁。他和Elizabeth Zouche至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1344年1月29日在英国諾福爾可英厄姆享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from any of the places called Ingham, particularly in Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Suffolk. The placename is from the Old English personal name Inga + hām ‘homestead’. In Yorkshire this name was sometimes confused with Bingham in the 18th century.
English (of Norman origin): variant of the obsolete Norman surname Engaine; see Gain .

variants.name: Bingham
meanings: English (Dorset) and Irish (County Mayo): habitational name from Bingham (Nottinghamshire). The placename is probably from an Old English folk-name Bynningas (‘the people associated with a man named Bynna’), or possibly from an unattested Old English word bing ‘a kettle-shaped hollow’, + Old English hām ‘homestead’.
Irish (Ulster, of Scottish origin): altered form of   Bigham  .
American shortened and altered form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames such as   Bingenheimer  .

variants.name: Gain
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a cunning person, from Engaine, which is based on Old French engaigne ‘ingenuity, cunning, trickery’.

English: habitiational name from any of various places called after the Engain family, including Colne Engaine and Gaynes Park (Essex), d'Engaine's Farm (Cambridgeshire), and Aston Ingham (Hereford). Engaine (see 1 above) was the name of a powerful Norman family with lands in several counties. The original form of the surname has since died out, surviving as Gain and its variants. There has also been considerable confusion with Ingham .
French: nickname from a noun derivative of Old French gaainier ‘to obtain, gain, win’.

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Oliver Ingham was born about 1287, in England, his father, John de Ingham, was 38 and his mother, Margery De Ingham, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Zouche. He died on 29 January 1344, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Oliver Ingham est né environ 1287, à Angleterre, son père, John de Ingham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery De Ingham, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Zouche. Il est décédé le 29 janvier 1344, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Oliver Ingham um 1287 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Ingham 38 und seine Mutter Margery De Ingham 22. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Zouche mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Januar 1344 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Oliver Ingham è nato il circa 1287 nel England, il suo padre, John de Ingham, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margery De Ingham, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Zouche. Morì il 29 gennaio 1344, nel Ingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Inghamが約1287年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Inghamは38歳，母Margery De Inghamは22歳であった。彼はElizabeth Zoucheとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1344年1月29日にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで58歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Oliver Ingham(이)가 대략 1287년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Ingham(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery De Ingham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Zouche(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1344년 1월 29일 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

mn.Ingham, Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, Un: Ingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Oliver Ingham nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Ingham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery De Ingham, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Zouche. Ele faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1344, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Oliver Ingham родился около 1287 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John de Ingham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery De Ingham, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Zouche. Он умер 29 января 1344 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Oliver Ingham nació aproximadamente 1287, en Inglaterra, su papá, John de Ingham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margery De Ingham, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Zouche. Murió el 29 de enero de 1344, en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
